metadata.purpose: Prioritized CRISP-DM experiment backlog for accuracy improvement without auto-running compute-heavy jobs.
metadata.guardrail: Do not execute training, CV, tuning, Kaggle submission, or long jobs without explicit frisky approval.

experiments.hypothesis: Rows changed between v2 and v3 reveal boundary regions where local CV improved but public LB tied.
Boundary-aware and robust sequence feature recipes can be generated deterministically without target leakage.
Boundary-aware features improve adjacent-class decisions near quartile thresholds.
experiments.promotion_rule: Only run full CV if smoke beats production_v3 seed-42 analogue or improves boundary confusion.

experiments.hypothesis: Learned or near-quartile thresholds can improve CV without sacrificing class-balance plausibility.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote if threshold mode improves OOF accuracy and keeps test counts within approved tolerance.

experiments.hypothesis: Blending ranks instead of raw latent scores improves robustness to score-scale drift.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote if rank blend beats current core_tuned in smoke and changes a different set of uncertain rows.

experiments.hypothesis: A boundary-aware candidate that passes smoke will hold up across seeds 42..46.
experiments.promotion_rule: Mean CV >= 0.53056 or comparable mean with lower std and better class-boundary metrics.

experiments.hypothesis: A narrow search around the 150-trial best params may improve without wasting as much compute as broad search.
experiments.promotion_rule: Validation seeds must not underperform tune seeds by more than 0.0015.

experiments.hypothesis: A promoted candidate may improve public LB or provide private-score diversity.
experiments.promotion_rule: Only after validation output and exact command are shown to frisky.
